Broad Spectrum Protection Cream Spf 50+ For Adults And Children

Emotopic soothing & softening body emollient cream
HYDRATING LIPID-REPLENISHING BODY BALM preventing dry skin and recurring dryness 400 ml

රු6,900.00

SPECTRUM PROTECT | 50ml | For Adults & Children

Pharmaceris S Spectrum Protect SPF 50+ provides broad spectrum protection against UVA, UVB, HEV and IR rays for sensitive, dry and allergy-prone skin. Enriched with Shea Butter, Vitamin E and AntileuDNAprotect, it hydrates, prevents sunburn, dark spots and sun-induced ageing. Lightweight, water-resistant and safe for the whole family including babies from 6 months. Clinically and dermatologically tested.

Availability: 7 in stock SKU: 839 Categories: Body, Dry Skin, Pharmaceris
Purchase & earn 138 points!Purchase & earn 69 points!
Facebook Twitter LinkedIn Google + Email
Add to wishlist
Compare
  • Description
  • Reviews (0)

Description

Description

A premium dermatological sunscreen specially formulated for delicate, sensitive and dry skin that is prone to allergies and hyperpigmentation. This ultra-light cream delivers very high protection from the full spectrum of harmful radiation — UVA, UVB, HEV (visible light) and IR (infrared) rays that reach the earth’s surface.

Suitable for babies over 6 months, children and adults, making it the perfect family sun protection solution. Clinically and dermatologically tested for even the most sensitive skin types.

KEY BENEFITS

  • Broad Spectrum SPF 50+ — protects against UVA, UVB, HEV & IR radiation
  • AntileuDNAprotect — creates a powerful barrier for the skin’s immune system
  • Deeply hydrating — nourishes, moisturises and regenerates the skin
  • Minimises sun reactions — reduces irritation, redness, sunburn, sun rash, discolourations & allergic reactions
  • Family-safe formula — suitable for babies (6 months+), children & adults
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Clinically & dermatologically tested on very sensitive skin

KEY INGREDIENTS

  • AntileuDNAprotect – Protects skin’s immune system & DNA from radiation damage
  • Shea Butter – Deep nourishment, prevents dryness & hypersensitivity
  • Vitamin E (Tocopherol) – Antioxidant protection, skin repair
  • Broad Spectrum UVA/UVB Filters – Maximum sun protection across all wavelengths

HOW TO USE

  1. Apply a sufficient amount of cream on the face
  2. Use 20–30 minutes before sun exposure
  3. Reapply every 2 hours and after bathing or swimming
  4. Suitable for daily use
